title: rhamnus cathartica f. cadevallii
intro: Rhamnus cathartica f. cadevallii, also known as the Cade oil tree, is a variant of the buckthorn shrub, characterized by its distinctive bark and oil-rich leaves. The plant contains a high concentration of cade oil, which is known for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rhamnus cathartica f. cadevallii include treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of oil, salves, and creams, and can also be used as a natural insect repellent.
